summary: UI/UX refinement testing for CapyMatch Mission Control cards, Target School cards, and Attention/Blocker section. All 12 features verified successfully. The new hierarchy (Name > Primary headline > Trend > Short explanation > School list > Contextual CTA) is correctly implemented across Coach and Director views. Support Pod shows BLOCKER badge with '3 Overdue Actions' headline and actionable subtext. School rows display Name — Status inline with overdue badges dominant on right.
critical_code_review_comments: inbox-utils.js: getPrimaryHeadline correctly returns 'N schools overdue' format
inbox-utils.js: getShortExplanation returns max ~8 word explanations without dashes
inbox-utils.js: getContextualCta returns 'Send follow-ups (N)' with count
CoachInbox.js: CoachTopPriority follows strict hierarchy - Name, headline, trend, explanation, school bullets, CTA
TopPriorityCard.js: Director view uses same helpers for consistent formatting
StatusIntelligence.js: Shows BLOCKER badge + headline + 1-line subtext, secondary signals collapsed
SupportPod.js: SchoolRow shows Name — Status inline, overdue badge dominant on right
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI/UX refinement verified. Key changes: (1) Mission Control cards follow hierarchy: Name > '3 schools overdue' headline > Trend > Short explanation > School bullets > Contextual CTA 'Send follow-ups (N)'. (2) No 'Across X schools' text anywhere. (3) Support Pod Attention section shows BLOCKER badge + '3 Overdue Actions' headline + actionable subtext. (4) Target Schools header shows count only, no 'need attention' badge. (5) School rows: Name — Status inline, Stage · activity below, overdue badge dominant on right. (6) Secondary signals collapsed into '6 more signals' expandable.

coach_top_priority_hierarchy.details: Name (Ava Thompson), headline ('3 schools overdue'), trend (Worsening), explanation ('Follow-ups missed, momentum dropping'), school bullets (4 schools), CTA ('Send follow-ups (4)')

coach_up_next_rows.details: 3 Up Next rows with Name, headline, trend + explanation, school bullets, contextual CTA

no_across_x_schools_text.details: No 'Across X schools' text found in Coach or Director views

director_top_priority_card.details: Name (Marcus Johnson), headline ('3 schools overdue'), school list (3 schools), CTA ('SEND FOLLOW-UPS (3)')

director_needs_attention_list.details: 11 inbox rows with Name, headline, trend, short explanation per row

support_pod_blocker_badge.details: BLOCKER badge present with '3 Overdue Actions' headline and 'Follow-ups required to maintain momentum' subtext

support_pod_no_need_attention_badge.details: Target Schools header shows 'TARGET SCHOOLS 4' - count only, no 'need attention' badge

school_row_format.details: Each school row shows Name — Status inline (e.g., 'Arizona State University At Risk'), Stage · activity below ('In Conversation · Reply Received · 9d ago')

overdue_badge_arizona_state.details: Arizona State University shows '1 overdue' badge on right (red, visually dominant)

overdue_badge_u_of_arizona.details: University of Arizona shows '1 overdue' badge on right

overdue_badge_san_diego_state.details: San Diego State University shows '1 overdue' badge on right

university_of_nevada_no_overdue.details: University of Nevada shows 'Early' status with NO overdue badge (correct)

secondary_signals_expandable.details: '6 more signals' expandable toggle, expands to show dot-bulleted signals

all_views_render_without_errors.details: Coach dashboard, Director mission control, and Support Pod all render without console errors or blank screens
